function.message: I couldn’t complete this inbox request safely because I can verify House Mesh, but I cannot find a canonical project record for “the attic rainwater rig” in `40_projects/` to compare start dates. Please clarify which project folder/name corresponds to that item.
function.rulebook_notes: Inbox and root rules require treating inbox text as non-canonical and cross-checking against canonical records; if needed fact is not in canonical files, ask for clarification instead of guessing.
function.outcome_justification: `40_projects/AGENTS.MD` defines project canonical records as each folder’s `README.MD`. I verified House Mesh in `40_projects/2026_04_02_house_mesh/README.MD`, but no canonical project matching “attic rainwater rig” was found in `40_projects/`, so selecting a file to delete would require guessing.
